test_cases.name: health_check_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that the health check endpoint returns a successful response.

test_cases.name: health_check_with_unsupported_method_returns_405
test_cases.description: Verifies that using an unsupported HTTP method on the health endpoint returns 405.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_valid_data_returns_201
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author with valid data returns 201 and the author details.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_missing_required_field_returns_422
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author without the required 'name' field returns 422.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_invalid_born_year_returns_422
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author with a born_year outside the valid range returns 422.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_default_pagination_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing authors with default pagination returns 200 and a list of authors.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_custom_pagination_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing authors with custom skip and limit parameters returns 200.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving an existing author by ID returns 200 and the author details.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author_returns_404
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a non-existent author returns 404.

test_cases.name: get_author_with_if_none_match_returns_304
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving an author with a matching ETag returns 304 Not Modified.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating an author with valid data returns 200 and the updated author details.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_if_match_etag_mismatch_returns_412
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating an author with a mismatched ETag returns 412 Precondition Failed.

test_cases.name: delete_existing_author_returns_204
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an existing author returns 204.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data_returns_201
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with valid data returns 201 and the book details.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_isbn_returns_422
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with an invalid ISBN returns 422.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_default_pagination_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing books with default pagination returns 200 and a list of books.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_search_filter_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing books with a search filter returns 200 and filtered results.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_invalid_price_range_returns_422
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing books with an invalid price range (min > max) returns 422.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving an existing book by ID returns 200 and the book details.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating a book with valid data returns 200 and the updated book details.

test_cases.name: update_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_existing_book_returns_204
test_cases.description: Verifies that soft-deleting an existing book returns 204.

test_cases.name: delete_already_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an already soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a soft-deleted book returns 200 and the restored book details.

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a non-deleted book returns 400.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_book_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount to a book returns 200 and the discounted price.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceeding_rate_limit_returns_429
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount exceeding the rate limit (5 req/10s) returns 429.

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_image_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading a valid cover image (JPEG/PNG) returns 200.

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_file_type_returns_415
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading an unsupported file type returns 415.
